steps.title: Interpret x in the function h(x)
steps.content: The function $ h(x) $ models the number of students $ x $ years after the organization's establishment. Here, $ x = 4 $ represents 4 years after the start. The output $ h(4) = 46 $ directly means the estimated number of students at that point.

steps.title: Match the interpretation to the correct choice
steps.content:
It is estimated there were 46 students in the school organization 4 years after it was established. states: '...46 students in the organization 4 years after it was established.' This aligns with $ h(4) = 46 $, where the input $ x = 4 $ years directly maps to the described time period. Other choices incorrectly associate 46 students with 0 or 12 years.

That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
